name: Risk factors for venous thromboembolism in ICU patients
summary: Several risk factors are associated with increased venous thromboembolism risk in ICU patients.

studies.author: Yang et al.
studies.citation: Yang et al. Risk factors of venous thromboembolism in ICU patients: a systematic review and meta-analysis. Ann Med 2026.
